validation.skillDescription: Audit and improve Codex AGENTS.md guidance files and companion code_map.md navigation maps in repositories. Use when the user asks to check, audit, update, optimize, or fix AGENTS.md files; asks for Codex project guidance maintenance; mentions nested AGENTS.md conflicts, code maps, stale commands, scoped instructions, sandbox or approval boundaries; or says "优化 AGENTS.md", "审计 AGENTS.md", "检查 nested AGENTS.md", "更新 Codex 项目指导", or "生成 code_map.md".
